operational_knowledge_units.title: Primary service requires three running programs for system operation
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide states that on the primary service there are three programs that must be running for the system to run: Ignition, Stunnel, and OptiSweep.
observed_evidence: Slide text: "On the primary service there are 3 programs that must be running for the system to run"
Bullet list names the programs: "Ignition", "Stunnel", and "OptiSweep"
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: On the primary service, three programs must be running for the OptiSweep system to run: Ignition, Stunnel, and OptiSweep.

operational_knowledge_units.title: Ignition is used for OPC connections
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide identifies Ignition as the program used for OPC connections on the primary service.
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Ignition is the service/program on the primary service used for OPC connections.

operational_knowledge_units.title: Stunnel provides secure encryption for UPS xle chat
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide identifies Stunnel as the program used for secure encryption to UPS xle chat.
observed_evidence: Sub-bullet text: "Used for secure encryption to UPS xle chat"

relationships.to: secure encryption to UPS xle chat

operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Stunnel is used for secure encryption to UPS xle chat on the primary service.

operational_knowledge_units.title: OptiSweep service coordinates system operations
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide describes the OptiSweep program as FORTNA's service that coordinates all operations.
observed_evidence: Sub-bullet text: "Fortna’s service that coordinates all operations."
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: The OptiSweep service is described as FORTNA's service that coordinates all operations.

procedure_candidate_attempts.title: No procedure extracted from service overview slide
